title: Competitor Crawl Completed Event
description: Emitted when a scheduled or on-demand crawl of competitor data sources completes in the competitor_analysis system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

crawl_id.description: Unique identifier for the crawl job execution.

market_code.description: Market region code that was crawled (e.g., CN, US, EU).

new_added.description: Count of new competitor records added during the crawl.

updated.description: Count of existing competitor records updated during the crawl.

skipped.description: Count of records skipped during the crawl (e.g., unchanged or invalid).

failed.description: Optional count of records that failed to process during the crawl.

total_processed.description: Optional total number of records processed during the crawl.

crawl_duration_seconds.description: Optional duration of the crawl job in seconds.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the crawl completed.
